steps.description: Wait for page and CMP cookie overlay to render
Dismiss CMP cookie consent (OK button is an <a> tag)
Wait for cookie overlay to close
Wait for login and reCAPTCHA v3 verification
Wait for orders page to render

jsExtractConfig.extractScript: var results=[]; var sections=document.querySelectorAll('main section, main > div > div, [data-testid*=order], [class*=OrderCard], [class*=orderCard], [class*=order-card], [class*=order-item]'); if(sections.length===0) sections=document.querySelectorAll('main > div > div > div'); var processedIds={}; var statusKeywords={'in bearbeitung':'processing','wird bearbeitet':'processing','versendet':'shipped','auf dem weg':'shipped','unterwegs':'shipped','geliefert':'delivered','zugestellt':'delivered','abgeholt':'delivered','storniert':'cancelled','retourniert':'returned','rücksendung':'returned'}; var trackingPatterns=[/(?:Sendungsnummer|Tracking|Paketnummer|Sendungsverfolgung)[:\s]*([A-Z0-9]{8,30})/gi,/\b(JJD\d{16,20})\b/g,/\b(0034\d{16,20})\b/g]; var carrierPatterns=[/(DHL|Hermes|DPD|GLS|UPS|Deutsche Post)/i]; for(var i=0;i<sections.length;i++){var sec=sections[i]; var text=(sec.textContent||'').trim(); if(text.length<20||text.length>5000) continue; var idMatch=text.match(/(?:Bestellnummer|Bestell-Nr\.?|Bestellung|Nr\.)[:\s#]*([A-Z0-9-]{5,20})/i); if(!idMatch){var numMatch=text.match(/\b(\d{7,12})\b/); if(numMatch && text.toLowerCase().indexOf('bestell')!==-1) idMatch=[null,numMatch[1]];} if(!idMatch) continue; var orderId=idMatch[1]; if(processedIds[orderId]) continue; processedIds[orderId]=true; var textLower=text.toLowerCase(); var status=null; var rawStatus=null; for(var kw in statusKeywords){if(textLower.indexOf(kw)!==-1){status=statusKeywords[kw]; rawStatus=kw; break;}} var tracking=null; var carrier=null; for(var tp=0;tp<trackingPatterns.length;tp++){trackingPatterns[tp].lastIndex=0; var tm=trackingPatterns[tp].exec(text); if(tm){tracking=tm[1]; break;}} for(var cp=0;cp<carrierPatterns.length;cp++){carrierPatterns[cp].lastIndex=0; var cm=carrierPatterns[cp].exec(text); if(cm){carrier=cm[1]; break;}} var dateMatch=text.match(/(?:Lieferung|Zustellung|voraussichtlich|geliefert am)[^\d]*(\d{1,2})[.\/-](\d{1,2})[.\/-](\d{2,4})/i); var deliveryDate=null; if(dateMatch){var dd=dateMatch[1].length===1?'0'+dateMatch[1]:dateMatch[1]; var mm=dateMatch[2].length===1?'0'+dateMatch[2]:dateMatch[2]; var yy=dateMatch[3].length===2?'20'+dateMatch[3]:dateMatch[3]; deliveryDate=yy+'-'+mm+'-'+dd;} var links=sec.querySelectorAll('a[href]'); for(var li=0;li<links.length&&!tracking;li++){var href=links[li].getAttribute('href')||''; var dhlM=href.match(/[?&]idc=([A-Z0-9]+)/i); if(dhlM){tracking=dhlM[1]; carrier='DHL';} var hermesM=href.match(/sendungsnummer[=/]([A-Z0-9]+)/i); if(hermesM){tracking=hermesM[1]; carrier='Hermes';}} results.push({shopOrderId:orderId,status:status,rawStatus:rawStatus,trackingNumber:tracking,courier:carrier,referenceNumber:null,estimatedDeliveryDate:deliveryDate,success:true});} return results;
